overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an open-world action game (Assassin's Creed Odyssey) showing a character walking through an ancient Greek shipyard. The character exits a wooden ship hull and explores a sunny dock area with ships under construction, wooden scaffolding, and mountainous coastal backdrop.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior of wooden ship hull under construction

agents.ego_description: walking forward through the narrow wooden interior of a ship hull, moving toward the exit

entered.detail: curved wooden ribs of ship hull creating a tunnel-like structure
weathered wooden decking with gaps showing light below
thick vertical wooden posts supporting the ship structure
striped shadows cast by sunlight filtering through wooden slats above

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the narrow, enclosed interior of a wooden ship under construction. Striped shadows from overhead slats pattern the wooden deck as the character moves forward through the curved hull toward the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open shipyard dock with mountain backdrop

events.description: exits the enclosed ship hull into bright open shipyard

agents.ego_description: walking through the open shipyard, passing workers and wooden structures

notable_agents.action: worker standing near red fabric barrier, facing away from camera

entered.detail: large red cloth barrier draped over wooden scaffolding
large rocky mountain with sparse vegetation rising behind the shipyard
ancient stone structure with flat roof adjacent to the dock
rough timber framework surrounding ships under construction

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the ship hull into a bright, open shipyard. A massive mountain dominates the background while wooden scaffolding and stone buildings line the dock. Workers move about the area as the character walks across the wooden planks toward the center of the yard.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront dock with ships under construction

events.description: character turns left, revealing the sea and coastline

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking along the waterfront, observing ships under construction

notable_agents.action: worker walking along the dock near the water's edge

entered.detail: massive wooden trireme with scaffolding and incomplete hull
bright blue Mediterranean water visible between ships
stone block base supporting wooden ship structures

segments.scene_description: The character turns left, revealing the bright blue sea between the ships. Walking along the waterfront, the character passes a large trireme under construction supported by stone foundations. Workers move along the dock as wooden scaffolding towers above.

scene_state.functional_zone: shipyard entrance with wooden archway gate

agents.ego_description: walking toward a large wooden archway gate, approaching a waypoint marker

entered.detail: large timber frame structure marking the entrance to the shipyard area
glowing purple game waypoint marker hovering in the air
damaged wooden hull and scattered timber debris

segments.scene_description: The character continues forward through the shipyard, approaching a large wooden archway gate that marks the entrance to the inner dock area. A glowing purple objective marker hovers in the distance, guiding the character toward the next destination. The wooden planks of the dock stretch ahead, lined with ship wreckage and construction materials.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the dim, enclosed interior of a ship hull into the expansive brightness of an ancient Greek shipyard. It begins within the narrow wooden confines of a vessel under construction, where striped shadows pattern the deck as the character moves toward the light. As the character emerges from the hull, the scene opens into a sun-drenched dock dominated by a massive mountain and bustling workers amidst stone buildings and scaffolding. The camera then shifts left to reveal the bright blue sea and a large trireme supported by stone foundations before continuing forward along the wooden planks. Finally, the path leads toward a large wooden archway gate, guided by a glowing purple objective marker hovering over a landscape of ship wreckage and construction materials.
